case_title: MICHAEL GOLLNICK VS. WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLLNICK, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT VIOLATE VEHICLE CODE SECTION 22658 AS SIGN WAS POSTED AT ENTRANCE IN CONFORMITY WITH SECTION 22658 (A) (1) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
